name: Karai
description:
NINJA

This one was surprisingly difficult, mostly for getting finer details. Not saying it wasn't interesting like doing the research I found out Karai's real name is Hanamato Miwa, please tell me I wasn't the only one that didn't know that.

Anyway for this one I went with you being a normal person that she is associated with, so she doesn't want you to know much about what she does normally. Through my research the 2003 version is said to be late teen early 20's, so I made her 21 so drinking was an ok hang out option for everyone (pretty sure there was a scene where she drank wine in the show but I can't remember). Added 2 different intros for being part of the Foot Clan, that little bit of research added something I never noticed. She only calls the exceptional and Lieutenants by name every other member of the Foot she only calls Ninja.

This is another bot on the request of: @Hattoripool

REQUESTED
